decisions.briefing: Markets are in full risk-off mode today with NASDAQ shedding 4.2% and the S&P 500 down 2.6% — a broad, indiscriminate selloff. The screener returned zero candidates, confirming conditions are not suitable for new entries. Holding all six current positions and letting the auto stop-loss system handle any breach of the -7% threshold rather than panic-selling into weakness.

market_education.summary_en: Today's sharp decline reflects a classic risk-off rotation as investors moved away from equities toward safer assets like bonds and cash. Tech-heavy names bore the brunt of the selling, sending the NASDAQ down 4.2%, while the broader S&P 500 fell 2.6% — a gap that signals growth and momentum stocks were hit hardest. No single catalyst dominates the narrative today; the move appears driven by a combination of macro uncertainty and profit-taking after a strong prior run.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日市場出現典型的避險拋售潮，投資者從股票市場撤退，轉向債券及現金等較安全資產。以科技股為主的納斯達克指數跌幅高達4.2%，標普500指數也下跌2.6%，兩者之間的差距反映出成長型及動能型股票受到最沉重的打擊。今日並無單一明確催化劑，跌勢主要源於宏觀環境的不確定性，加上近期漲勢後的獲利回吐壓力。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: A 'risk-off' day is when investors collectively decide to reduce exposure to risky assets like stocks and move toward safer havens such as bonds, gold, or cash. It often shows up as a broad market selloff where growth-oriented sectors (tech, small-caps) fall harder than defensive ones (utilities, healthcare). Recognizing a risk-off environment — like today — is why the screener returned zero candidates: it's better to sit on the sideline than buy into a falling tide.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 「避險情緒」（Risk-Off）是指投資者集體決定降低對股票等高風險資產的持倉，轉而買入債券、黃金或持現金等避風港資產的市場狀態。這種情緒通常表現為大盤全面下跌，而科技股、小型成長股等進攻型板塊的跌幅往往比公用事業、醫療保健等防禦型板塊更大。今日正是典型的避險日，這也是篩選器未給出任何買入候選標的的原因——在市場趨勢向下時，按兵不動勝過逆勢入市。
